title: apium luteum
intro: Apium luteum, also known as wild celery or yellow lovage, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Apium luteum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Apium luteum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
